'''nachala''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:ppq|ppq]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-ch-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ppq|ppq]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| nachala
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:næchælæth|næchælæth]] || [[word:næchælæj|næchælæj]] || [[word:næchælæsh|næchælæsh]] || [[word:næchælæ|næchælæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:nachachalath|nachachalath]] || [[word:nachachalaj|nachachalaj]] || [[word:nachachalash|nachachalash]] || [[word:nachachala|nachachala]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:nachalath|nachalath]] || [[word:nachalaj|nachalaj]] || [[word:nachalash|nachalash]] || [[word:nachala|nachala]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:nachaflath|nachaflath]] || [[word:nachaflaj|nachaflaj]] || [[word:nachaflash|nachaflash]] || [[word:nachaflaf|nachaflaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:nachalatha|nachalatha]] || [[word:nachalaja|nachalaja]] || [[word:nachalasha|nachalasha]] || [[word:nachalaka|nachalaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:nachalath|nachalath]] || [[word:nachalaj|nachalaj]] || [[word:nachalash|nachalash]] || [[word:nachala|nachala]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:nachalathal|nachalathal]] || [[word:nachalajal|nachalajal]] || [[word:nachalashal|nachalashal]] || [[word:nachalakal|nachalakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:nachalathatha|nachalathatha]] || [[word:nachalajaja|nachalajaja]] || [[word:nachalashasha|nachalashasha]] || [[word:nachalaka|nachalaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:nachalathan|nachalathan]] || [[word:nachalajan|nachalajan]] || [[word:nachalashan|nachalashan]] || [[word:nachalakan|nachalakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:nachalathaoro|nachalathaoro]] || [[word:nachalajaoro|nachalajaoro]] || [[word:nachalashaoro|nachalashaoro]] || [[word:nachalakaoro|nachalakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|91d6f4e}}
